author: claude
content: fix/socket-hardening #1180: clean (no conflicts); rebased -b 4 commits onto master 315e6672. Extension npm ci+build green & reproducible (no drift); jj-precommit green (black/isort/mypy). Pure-python socket+config tests 5 passed. ENV CAVEAT: test_socket_echo_roundtrips_through_real_extension is RED but only due to local Firefox 150.0.2 vs master extension strict_min_version 152.0 -- a master-wide env block affecting every browser test equally, NOT a branch regression. new tip 4f2f109e; MERGEABLE.
